title: elatine paludosa subsp. major
intro: Elatine paludosa subsp. major is a subspecies of the Elatine paludosa plant, also known as the marsh warty-cow-wheat or marsh warty cow wheat, a type of flowering plant in the family Elatinaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elatine paludosa subsp. major include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine.
